/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O2 -O3 CMakeFiles/server_benchmark_core.dir/__/tests/benchmark/core_benchmark.cpp.o -o ../bin/server_benchmark_core  libserver_lib.a "/mnt/d/Personal_project/High-Concurrency TCP Message Server/.cache/deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a" -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so
